subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! The time for sacrifice of life is at hand, and the moment for joyous celebration hath come. This is the breath of life everlasting and the day of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی وقت جانفشانیست و هنگام دست افشانی دم حیات جاودانیست و روز جلوه
subcodes.subjects: @Ascension of Baha'u'llah, @The Holy Spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @call to action
